'''Ferfer''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] who was a part of the [[Ryn Network]], as gatherer One-Six-Four out of [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He was a member of [[Team Meloque]], who infiltrated [[Yuuzhan Vong]]-occupied [[Caluula/Legends|Caluula]] in order to destroy that [[Planet/Legends|world's]] [[yammosk]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|the last year]] of [[Yuuzhan Vong War|the war]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when he was split open by an [[amphistaff]] wielded by a [[Slayers|Slayer]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
